title: Marbella Catamaran Charter Wedding Costs & Guide 2026
html:
Planning a wedding in Marbella? A catamaran charter offers a unique ceremony on the Mediterranean, with departures from Puerto Banús. Prices for a private catamaran wedding start from around 3,500 EUR. Find your ideal vessel through BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.

How much does it cost to rent a catamaran for a wedding in Marbella?

Expect to pay between 3,500 EUR and 12,000 EUR for a full-day catamaran charter for up to 30 guests. The final price depends on the vessel size, duration, catering, and added services such as a photographer or DJ. Compare verified options via boat hire Marbella on BoatHire24, where you can filter by capacity and amenities. You can boat hire Marbella for your chosen dates.

Many charters include a skipper, fuel, and basic catering. High-season weddings in August often command a 20 % premium. For a crewed Lagoon 620, expect around 8,000 EUR for eight hours.

Where to set off in Marbella

Most catamaran weddings depart from Puerto Banús, a glamorous marina with shops and restaurants. Other options include the Marbella Club Hotel’s private jetty, Cabopino Marina for a quieter start, and La Bajadilla near the old town. Typical cruising grounds stretch from the Marbella coastline west to the cliffs of Cabopino, or east to the dunes of Artola. The anchor-drop ceremony often takes place a mile offshore for uninterrupted sea views. One option worth a look is the Sunseeker 68 Sport listing.

Which boat to rent

  1. Catamaran (40-50 ft), Best for stability and space; suitable for 20-30 guests; from 3,500 EUR.
  2. Motor Yacht (60-80 ft), Ideal for a cocktail-style wedding; capacity 30-50 guests; from 5,000 EUR.
  3. Sail Yacht (50-60 ft), For intimate ceremonies with up to 12 guests; from 2,500 EUR.
  4. Luxury Yacht (90+ ft), Offers multiple decks and a dedicated wedding planner; up to 100 guests; from 12,000 EUR. The Sunseeker 68 Sport is a popular choice; see the Sunseeker 68 Sport listing for exact availability and pricing.

Cost breakdown by charter type

  • Shared sunset cruise: from 80 EUR per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests): from 400 EUR
  • Catamaran full-day (for the wedding party): from 3,500 EUR
  • Crewed yacht including catering and host: from 6,000 EUR

When to book and what about a licence?

The wedding season in Marbella runs from May to October, with July and August being the busiest months. The local Poniente wind (west‐west) is common in summer, but catamarans handle it well.

Book six months ahead for a July or August wedding; April and October offer cooler weather and lower prices but still reliable conditions for an outdoor ceremony.

If you rent a skippered charter, no licence is required, the operator holds all credentials. For bareboat hire, a valid ICC or equivalent license is needed; your operator will confirm exact requirements at the time of booking.

At a glance

  • Price range: 3,500, 12,000 EUR
  • Peak months: July, August
  • Trip length: 4, 8 hours
  • Guest capacity: up to 30 (catamaran)
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can we get married legally on a catamaran in Marbella?

Only symbolic ceremonies are permitted on the water in Spain, but the ship’s captain can officiate a non‑legal vow exchange, and you can make it official at the registry office later.

Is catering included in the charter price?

Most wedding packages include a buffet or three‑course meal, and you can upgrade to a gourmet menu with champagne for an extra 50, 80 EUR per person.

What happens if the weather is bad?

The skipper will decide on the day; if the sea is unsafe, most operators offer a full refund or reschedule.

Can we decorate the catamaran ourselves?

Yes, as long as decorations are flame‑retardant and do not damage the gel coat, confirm with the charter company in advance.

Whether you want a grand celebration or an intimate exchange, the Marbella coast sets a stunning scene for a nautical wedding in 2026. Boat owners can also list your boat on Boathire24 and earn income during the busy season.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
